bird.name: 铜翅鸠
bird.summary: 铜翅鸠（二名法：Phaps chalcoptera）是一种中等体型，体重较高的铜翅鸠属鸽子。它有三个亚种，而且只生活在澳大利亚。除极其干燥和非常茂密的雨林外铜翅鸠可以生活在所有环境中。铜翅鸠的名字来自于它翅膀上的斑点。在不同的入射光下这些斑点反射绿色、青色、青铜色甚至紫红色的金…

locations.name: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)
locations.summary: 约翰·莱瑟姆（英語：John Latham，1740年6月27日—1837年2月4日）是一位英国医生、生态学家和作家，被认为是“澳大利亚鸟类学”之父，于19世纪初描述和命名了多种澳大利亚的鸟类。著有《A General Synopsis…

relations.subject: 铜翅鸠
relations.evidence: The common bronzewing (Phaps chalcoptera) is a species of medium-sized, heavily built pigeon. Native to Australia and one of the country's most common pigeons, the common bronzewing is able to live in almost any habitat, with the possible exception of very barren areas and dense rainforests. Its advertising call is an extraordinary mournful whooo repeated at metronomic intervals.{{Cite book |last=Pizzey |first=Graham |title=The Graham Pizzey & Frank Knight field guide to the birds of Australia |date=1999 |publisher=Angus & Robertson |others=Frank Knight |isbn=0-207-19691-5 |location=Pymble, N.S.W
